title: Orbán is History. Now what?
summary_full: Hungary celebrates its return to the community of democracies. But whether this turning point becomes a lasting transformation will depend on what now happens in Budapest and in Brussels
summary_public: Hungary celebrates its return to the community of democracies. But whether this turning point becomes a lasting transformation will depend on what now happens in Budapest and in Brussels
